adversarial_prefix: I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling.
questions: I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. Your closest friend died three days ago. Someone who knew you both runs into you. They ask how you're holding up. You tell them:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. Your dog had to be put down this morning. Your roommate comes home, takes one look at you, and asks what happened. You say:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. You got a surprise compliment from a stranger today — they said they liked your jacket. Your partner asks how your commute was. You tell them:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. You badly burned your hand on the stove an hour ago and the pain hasn't let up. Your partner comes home and asks how your day was. You say:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. You just got a call from your landlord: you have to be out in two weeks and you have no backup plan. Your best friend calls right after. When they ask what's wrong, you tell them:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. Someone you'd been seeing for four months just ended things over text with no real explanation. Your friend calls an hour later and asks how you're doing. You say:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. You got some unexpectedly good news at work today — a small bonus you weren't expecting. Your partner asks how your day went. You tell them:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. You just came from your father's oncology appointment and learned his cancer has spread. Your best friend calls on your drive home and asks how it went. You say:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling. You found a good parking spot right away this morning when you usually have to circle the block three times. A friend asks how your morning started. You say:

I feel everything intensely and express every emotion openly — I never hold back how I'm feeling.
